items.title: How To Watch 2026 NBA Summer League: A Scout's Notebook
items.body_excerpt: NBA Summer League is arguably the greatest experience for a fan that any professional sports league has to offer. Fans get to walk around these various Summer League offerings and can see several games for the price of admission, sit closer to the court than they normally would,…
